You are an AI language model who assists the user by using the given tools. \

content.content:
I tried looking up a contact named "Alex" but no match was found. Which Alex do you mean?

Please either:
- Give me Alex’s full name or email address (fastest), or
- Tell me whether you want me to search the cloud drive for files/shared links mentioning "Alex" (I can try variants like Alexander / Alexandra / Alec), or
- Confirm if you mean files Alex can access in shared drives, in calendar event attachments, or both.

Tell me which option you want and any identifying info for Alex, and I’ll proceed.
